category_sources: source_facts.description says portable make program with automake features; source_facts.homepage points to the official Schilytools source project.

docs_sources: Official Codeberg Schilytools project is the upstream source and best official documentation surface available from source_facts.homepage; smake-specific directory contains bundled project documentation/source files.
repo_sources: source_facts.repo is empty; source_facts.homepage is the official Codeberg Schilytools source-control project URL.
tags_sources: source_facts.description identifies smake as a portable make program with automake features; source_facts.executables lists smake.
